item.title: One year HRT anniversary!
item.description: Yes, I've always been a nerd. Now I'm a shieldmaiden on the teaching front lines instead of viking reenactment! ?? I can finally recognize myself after struggling since childhood. Facial feminization surgery in 6 weeks. Will travel alone to Spain for major surgery. Wish me luck! ?️‍⚧️❤️
item.dc:creator: Krascara

item.title: A Mega-Dump of Music from the '80s Airwaves
item.description:
The Bangles - Walk Like an Egyptian A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this Mega Dump - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0GPBvTbhOo8QmXHmhtiAoN?si=013d3d1996734285
Bobby McFerrin - Don't Worry, Be Happy
Madonna - Lucky Star
Taylor Dane - Tell It To My Heart
Falco - Rock Me Amadeus
Belinda Carlisle - Heaven is a Place on Earth
Dead or Alive - You Spin Me Round (Like a Record)
The GoGos - Vacation
Harold Faltermeyer - Axel F
Sinéad O'Connor - Nothing Compares 2 U
Eurythmics - Would I Lie to You?
Toto - Africa
Joan Jett (and the Blackhearts) - I Hate Myself for Loving You
Billy Joel - Uptown Girl
Tracy Chapman - Fast Car
Beastie Boys - No Sleep Til Brooklyn
Madonna - Into the Groove
Queen - One Vision
OPUS - Live is Life
Cyndi Lauper - Girls Just Wanna Have Fun (EDIT: A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0zx1WMC0oJD2nRwSOrBU4T ) The hit songs from 30 years ago, Wayback in 1993 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4
Huey Lewis and the News - Back in Time
Eddy Grant - Electric Avenue
WHAM - Wake Me Up (Before You Go Go)
Simple Minds - Don't You (Forget About Me)
Dolly Parton and Kenny Rogers - Islands in the Stream
Billy Idol - White Wedding
Sheena Easton - The Lover in Me
Dexys Midnight Runner - Come on Eileen
Bruce Springsteen - Dancing in the Dark
Whitney Houston - So Emotional
The Clash - Rock the Casbah
Elton John - I'm Still Standing
Tina Turner - We Don't Need Another Hero
Enya - Orinoco Flow
Pink Floyd - Another Brick in the Wall (Part 2)
aha - Take on Me
Thomas Dolby - She Blinded Me With Science
Huey Lewis and the News - The Power of Love
George Michael - Faith
Toni Basil - Mickey
Madonna - Holiday
Chris Issak - Wicked Game
The Pointer Sisters - Neutron Dance
Spandau Ballet - True
Dire Straits - Money for Nothing
RUN DMC - Mary Mary
Katrina and the Waves - Walking on Sunshine
Culture Club - Karma Chameleon
Duran Duran - The Wild Boys
Michael Jackson - Bllie Jean
Debbie Harry - Call Me A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/3AjwzxqE0t0vi8D92q7q5r Wayback in 73 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2rlT8Yh Wayback in 83 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 85 - https://imgur.com/gallery/lrddmXp Wayback in 88 - https://imgur.com/gallery/qBqeSu1 Wayback in 93 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 95 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkckKb3 Wayback in 98 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA Wayback in 03 - https://imgur.com/gallery/pyMZXVP
The B-52s - Rock Lobster
DeBarge - Rhythm of the Night
Glenn Frey - The Heat is On
Robert Palmer - Simply Irresistible
Poison - Every Rose Has Its Thorn
Duran Duran - A View to a Kill
Prince - Raspberry Beret
Elton John - Candle in the Wind
Cyndi Lauper - Good Enough (The Goonies)
Céline Dion - Where Does My Heart Beat Now?
Madonna - Like a Virgin
Weird Al Yankovic - Like a Surgeon
Cher - I Found Someone
Kylie Minogue - Locomotion A handy dandy Spotify playlist for this collection: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0aUVNGPFAuKN2MiEyHTR2K Wayback in 1973 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2rlT8Yh Wayback in 1983 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 1993 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 1998 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA
Sheena Easton - Telefone
Mike Oldfield and Maggie Reilly - Moonlight Shadow
Chaka Khan - Ain't Nobody
Rose Laurens - Africa
Bell Biv DeVoe - Poison
Guns N' Roses - Sweet Child O' Mine
RUN DMC - Run's House
Dio - Rainbow in the Dark
David Bowie - Let's Dance
Sandra - Maria Magdalena
The Beach Boys - Kokomo
Stetsasonic - Talkin' All That Jazz
Pat Benatar - We Belong
NWA - Fuck Tha Police I can't imagine why this particular song never recieved an official music video like the others on the album
Paula Abdul - Opposites Attract
Quiet Riot - Cum on Feel the Noize
Technotronic - Pump Up the Jam
Olivia Newton John - Twist of Fate
REO Speedwagon - Can't Fight This Feeling
Madonna - Crazy for You
Huey Lewis & The News - Perfect World
Duran Duran - Hungry Like the Wolf
Weird Al Yankovic - Dare to Be Stupid
Pat Benatar - All Fired Up
Corey Hart - Never Surrender
George Michael - Careless Whisper
Michael Sembello - Maniac
Daryl Hall & John Oates - Out Of Touch
Cyndi Lauper - All Through the Night
Foreigner - I Want to Know What Love Is
Jon Bon Jovi - Blaze Of Glory
Weird Al Yankovic - Money for Nothing (Beverly Hills)
Ofra Haza - Im Nin'Alu
Alphaville - Forever Young
Rick Astley - Never Gonna Give You Up
Starship - We Built this City
Sting and the Police - Every Breath You Take
Madonna - Holiday
Michael Jackson - Beat It
Bonnie Tyler - Holding Out for a Hero
Faith No More - Epic
Hall and Oates - Maneater
Pat Benatar - Love is a Battlefield
a-Ha - Stay On These Roads
Akina Nakamori - Meu Amoré
Chaka Khan - I Feel For You
Debbie Gibson - Out of the Blue
Sananda Maitreya - Sign Your Name
Pet Shop Boys - Heart
Slick Rick - Children's Story
Phil Collins - A Groovy Kind of Love
Anthrax, Public Enemy - Bring Tha Noize
Theme from S-Express
Salt-N-Pepa - Shake Your Thang
Kim Wilde - You Came
Sade - Smooth Operator
Dwight Yoakam and Buck Owens - Streets of Bakersfield
The Fixx - One Thing Leads to Another
Kirsty MacColl - A New England
Reba McEntire - I Can't Even Get the Blues No More
Mory Kanté - Yé ké Yé ké
Rod Stewart - Baby Jane
Natalie Cole - Pink Cadillac
Def Leppard - Pour Some Sugar On Me
Mary Jane Girls - In My House
Roseanne Cash - Runaway Train
New Edition - Mr. Telephone Man
The Romantics - Talking In Your Sleep
Richard Marx - Endless Summer Nights
Paul Young - Everytime You Go Away
Boy Meets Girl - Waiting for a Star to Fall
Lionel Richie - Hello
George Harrison - Got My Mind Set on You
Bobby Brown - My Prerogative
Mecano - Barco a Venus
The Traveling Wilburys - Handle With Care
Tiffany - Could've Been
Steve Winwood - Roll With It
Daniela Romo - Celos
Echo and the Bunnymen - The Cutter
Irene Cara - What a Feeling (Flashdance)
Laura Branigan - How Am I Supposed to Live Without You
ZZ Top - Doubleback
ZZ Top - Sharp Dressed Man
Bob Marley - Chant Down Babylon
The Flying Pickets - Only You
Elton John - I Guess That's Why They Call it the Blues
Yazz - The Only Way is Up
Lionel Richie - All Night Long

item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.title: SSG Jordan Bear
item.description: On this Memorial Day, please pause to remember those we have lost, like my nephew, Staff Sgt. Jordan Bear, KIA Zahary, Kandahar, Afghanistan March 1, 2012. RENDEZVOUS I have a rendezvous with Death At some disputed barricade, When Spring comes back with rustling shade And apple-blossoms fill the air - I have a rendezvous with Death When Spring brings back blue days and fair. It may be he shall take my hand And lead me into his dark land And close my eyes and quench my breath ­ It may be I shall pass him still. I have a rendezvous with Death On some scarred slope of battered hill, When Spring comes round again this year And the first meadow-flowers appear. God knows 'twere better to be deep Pillowed in silk and scented down, Where love throbs out in blissful sleep, Pulse nigh to pulse, and breath to breath, Where hushed awakenings are dear ... But I've a rendezvous with Death At midnight in some flaming town, When Spring trips north again this year, And I to my pledged word am true, I shall not fail that rendezvous. Alan Seeger 1888-1916
item.dc:creator: BrandonTeasdale

item.title: Images of Note: Forcefem King Charles
item.description:
Oh no
Orcas with drones, orcas with drones. Are they real? Yes they are. Orcas with drones, in no fly zones, they're killing people now.
WHAT?
yaay~
I mean the government openly thinks I shouldn't exist, why do you think I'm like the way I am.
This is what makes metal awesome and what freaks out non-metal fans.
http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii (I'm making a game about a man who lives in the Chicago bean.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For Streeeeeeam: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Leaded gas and Freon lol
item.description: This guy here first added lead to gasoline, then came up with the idea for Freon which destroyed the ozone. Source: https://amp.cnn.com/cnn/2024/05/24/world/thomas-midgley-jr-leaded-gas-freon-scn

item.title: My first look at my new foster kittens!
item.description: When I showed up to the shelter to pick up my new foster kittens, they were already in a carrier and ready to go. I couldn’t see much except the Calico mama because they were all nursing. I just got to the kitten room and opened the carrier doors and they have all escaped!! Looks like one orange and white, and four black and whites. And mama ain’t got no tail!! So cute. She is super scared so I’m gonna let them settle in for a while, then go in and get their sexes and weigh them. Then we can start thinking of names!! (Edit: Some awesome Imgurians have asked if they can help support my cause…I don’t need much, but there there are definitely things that would be helpful here: https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/2K634G59XZTP4?ref_=wl_share ) (and here they are! https://imgur.com/gallery/dDgPDeL )
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: As we all honor our fallen and injured soldiers this Memorial day let us not forget the appaling words of DJT
item.description: " Why should I go to that cemetery? It’s filled with losers and suckers for getting killed."- trump https://nymag.com/intelligencer/2023/09/trump-reportedly-said-no-one-wants-to-see-wounded-vets.html https://www.theatlantic.com/politics/archive/2020/09/trump-americans-who-died-at-war-are-losers-and-suckers/615997/
item.dc:creator: Iblamemyparentstoo
